js/locales/en/ui_en.json — English UI strings. All user-facing strings from the app shell. Keys follow the convention: {file_or_feature}_{description}. Strings with {placeholders} use t(key, { var: value }) interpolation.
appinit_orphan_warning: An cire karatuttuka daga ɗakin karatu (bayanai sun ɓace): {count}
appinit_restore_study_error: Ba a iya mayar da karatunka na ƙarshe ba. Maimakon haka, za a buɗe ɗakin karatu.
main_no_study_body: Da alama ba ka zaɓi karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki ba tukuna. Da fatan za a ziyarci ɗakin karatunka domin farawa.
main_titlepage_howto: Yadda za a yi amfani da wannan manhajar →
modals_likert_rotate_tip: 💡 Shawara: juya na'urarka a gefe domin ganin ma'aunin yadda ya kamata.
modals_notes_info_body:
Yi amfani da wannan wurin don duk abin da ba ya shiga cikin tsarin tambayoyin:

• Tunani na kashin kai game da babin

• Bayanan da aka ɗauka yayin tattaunawar ƙungiya

• Bayanan addu'a waɗanda abin da ka karanta ya tunatar da kai

• Tambayoyin da za a kai wa jagora ko mai ba da shawara

Ana haɗa waɗannan bayanan idan ka danna maɓallin Raba (Share) don wannan babin.
onboarding_app_slide1_heading: Mai Karanta Karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki
onboarding_app_slide1_body:
An riga an ɗora karatuttukan Littafi Mai Tsarki da dama kuma suna shirye don amfaninka.
  • Kowane ɗayansu kwas ne mai kunshe da nassoshin Littafi Mai Tsarki, tambayoyi, da tunani na kashin kai.
  • Karanta, yi tunani, kuma ka rubuta amsoshinka yayin da kake ci gaba.
  • Ana adana amsoshinka ta atomatik yayin da kake rubuta.
  • Amsoshinka na iya karɓar bayani ta atomatik (tsohuwar saiti), ko kuma sai lokacin da ka danna maɓalli. Za ka iya canza wannan ɗabi'ar a cikin saituna.
onboarding_app_slide2_heading: Zaɓi karatun da za ka fara
onboarding_app_slide2_body:
Lokacin da gabatarwa ta rufe, za ka ga Ɗakin Karatu — danna kowane karatu don buɗe shi.
  • Akwai ƙarin karatuttuka da za a iya saukewa daga shafin Ɗora (Load) a Ɗakin Karatu.
  • Karatuttukan suna zuwa ne a matsayin fayilolin .estudy — za ka iya ɗora ɗaya daga na'urarka idan ka karɓi ɗaya.
onboarding_app_slide3_body:
Shafin Yadda ake amfani ya yi bayani kan komai.
  • Danna gunkin ? a cikin mashigin kewayawa na sama a kowane lokaci.
Yanzu bari mu kai ka Ɗakin Karatu domin ka zaɓi karatu ka fara!
onboarding_starring_slide1_body: Danna gunkin tauraro a kan katin kowace tambaya domin yi mata alama. Tambayoyin da aka yi wa alama suna samun hasken zinari domin su fito fili yayin da kake aiki a cikin babin.
onboarding_starring_slide2_body: Dukkan tambayoyinka da aka yi wa alama suna bayyana a cikin shafin taƙaitawa a saman babin — har ma a cikin Bayanin Ci gaba. Wannan yana da amfani don shirye-shiryen tattaunawar ƙungiya ko kuma bitar kashin kai.
onboarding_search_slide1_body: Danna gunkin bincike a mashigin sama domin bincika dukkan tambayoyin da ke cikin karatun na yanzu — da kuma duk abin da ka rubuta a wuraren amsoshinka.
onboarding_search_slide2_body: Kowane sakamako yana nuna tambayar da amsarka tare. Danna kowane sakamako domin tsallakewa kai tsaye zuwa waccan babin da tambayar.
onboarding_sharing_slide1_body: Danna 'Raba' (Share) a ƙasan kowane babi domin tura amsoshin wancan babin ta hanyar WhatsApp, imel, ko wata manhaja da ke kan wayarka.
onboarding_sharing_slide2_body: Domin raba dukkan amsoshinka a lokaci guda, je zuwa Saituna → Karatu → Bayanai → Raba dukkan amsoshi. Akwai kuma zaɓin Buga / fitar da dukkan babi a matsayin PDF.
onboarding_sharing_slide3_body:
Je zuwa Saituna → Manhaja → Adanawa & Rabawa → Tsarin rabawa.

'WhatsApp Formatted' yana ƙara alamun ƙarfin rubutu waɗanda WhatsApp ke nuna su a matsayin 'bold'. 'Plain Text' yana da tsabta don imel. Za ka iya canza shi a kowane lokaci.
onboarding_myprogress_slide1_body: Danna gunkin ci gaba a mashigin sama domin buɗe Bayanin Ci gaba — taƙaitaccen bayani kan adadin tambayoyin da ka amsa a kowane babi, tare da zoben kammala kwas ɗin gaba ɗaya.
onboarding_myprogress_slide2_heading: Tambayoyin da aka yi wa alama ma suna nan
onboarding_myprogress_slide2_body: Dukkan tambayoyinka da aka yi wa alama daga kowane babi ana tattara su a cikin Bayanin Ci gaba — domin ka iya duba abin da ya fi muhimmanci a cikin dukkan karatun.
onboarding_voiceinput_slide1_body: Gunkin makirufo yana bayyana a cikin wuraren amsa akan na'urori masu goyan baya. Danna shi domin faɗin amsarka da murya — yana da amfani lokacin da rubutu akan ƙaramin allo ya ji kamar yana da jinkiri.
onboarding_voiceinput_slide2_body: Yi magana yadda kake yi kullum kuma ka dakata kafin danna 'tsaya'. Rubutun da aka canza daga murya zai bayyana a wurin amsa kuma za a iya gyara shi yadda aka ga dama bayan haka. Yana aiki a kowane harshe da na'urarka take goyan baya.
onboarding_readaloud_slide1_body: Gunkin lasifika a kan nassoshin Littafi Mai Tsarki da kuma faifan bayanai yana ba da damar manhajar ta karanta su da ƙarfi — yana da amfani don samun damar amfani, don saurare yayin tafiya, ko kawai don wata hanya daban ta hulɗa da rubutun.
onboarding_readaloud_slide2_body:
Je zuwa Saituna → Manhaja → Karanta da Ƙarfi domin zaɓar: Kada, Nassoshi masu tsawo kawai, ko Kullum.

Wannan saitin yana buƙatar yanayin ƙarin kayan aiki (Advanced interface mode).
onboarding_biblepopups_slide1_body:
A duk inda ka ga ƙaramin gunkin bayani kusa da nassi na Littafi Mai Tsarki, danna shi domin karanta nassin a wani faifai — ba tare da barin tambayar da kake aiki a kai ba.

Dukkan nassoshin daga Littafi Mai Tsarki na NET suke. Sauran gunkin bayanai suna ba da ƙarin bayani ko ma'anoni.
onboarding_notesarea_slide1_body: Kowane babi yana da wurin rubutu kyauta a ƙasan ƙasa — don duk abin da bai dace da tambayoyin da aka tsara ba: tunani na kashin kai, abubuwan da za a duba, tambayoyin da za a kawo wa ƙungiyarka.
onboarding_notesarea_slide2_heading: Ana Haɗa Bayanan kula lokacin da kake Raba
onboarding_notesarea_slide2_body:
Ana haɗa bayananka a cikin fitowar 'Raba' da kuma PDF da aka fitar — domin kada a bar komai a baya.

Shawara: danna wurin amsa na dogon lokaci (har da Bayanan kula) domin kwafa abin da ke ciki zuwa ga allo (clipboard).
onboarding_autosave_slide1_heading: Ba za ka ɓata aikinka ba
onboarding_autosave_slide1_body:
Manhajar tana adana amsarka ta atomatik a duk lokacin da ka matsa daga filin — don haka ba kwa buƙatar tunawa don adanawa.

Maballin 'Adana' a ƙasan kowane shafi yana ba ka damar yin ƙarin adanawa da hannu a duk lokacin da kake so.
onboarding_interfacemode_slide1_body:
Manhajar tana da yanayi guda uku: 'Basic', 'Intermediate', da 'Advanced'. 'Basic' yana ba ka ƙwarewa mai tsabta tare da mahimman abubuwa. Sauran yanayin suna buɗe ƙarin siffofi a hankali.

Za ka iya sauyawa a kowane lokaci — babu wani bayani da yake ɓacewa.
onboarding_interfacemode_slide2_body: Ka tuna inda na tsaya · Font ɗin karatu · Girman akwatin amsa · Shafin Ci gabana · Shafin Bayanan kula & Sharhi · Bayanan kula na Jagora · Saitunan ɗakin karatu · Sabuntawar Manhaja
onboarding_interfacemode_slide3_body:
Salon gunkin · Maballan Na gaba/Na baya · Sanarwar adanawa ta atomatik · Tsarin rabawa · Sarrafa Karanta da Ƙarfi · Sauya shafin 'Yadda za a yi amfani' da 'Game da mu'

Nemo Yanayin Kayan Aiki a ƙasan Saituna → Manhaja.
onboarding_library_slide1_body: Taɓa gunkin Laburare (sama-hagu) don ganin duk karatunka da aka ɗora. Taɓa kowane karatu don sauyawa zuwa gare shi. Amsoshinka a kowane karatu an ajiye su daban gaba ɗaya.
onboarding_library_slide2_body: Taɓa "Load Study" a ƙasan shafin Laburare don shigo da fayil ɗin .estudy. Da zarar an ɗora, ana ƙara karatun a jerinka har abada kuma ana iya buɗe shi a kowane lokaci.
onboarding_library_slide3_body:
Taɓa gunkin 🗑️ akan katin karatu don cire shi.

Wannan yana goge karatun da duk amsoshinka da aka ajiye don shi - har abada. Fitar da shi ko raba amsoshinka da farko idan kana son kiyaye su.
onboarding_progressbar_slide1_body:
Siririyar layin launi a ƙasan mashin sama yana nuna nawa kashi na tambayoyi a cikin babi na yanzu ka amsa. Yana sabuntawa yayin da kake adanawa.

Kuna iya kunna shi ko kashe shi a Saituna → App → Bayyanar → Nuna mashin ci gaba.
onboarding_swipenav_slide1_body: Swipe hagu don zuwa babi na gaba, dama don na baya. Hakanan zaka iya amfani da maɓallan 'Gaba' / 'Baya' a ƙasan kowane babi (waɗannan ana iya nuna su ko ɓoye su a Saituna).
onboarding_swipenav_slide2_body: Idan swipe yana jin kamar yana da sauƙin kunnawa da haɗari — ko kuma da wuya a yi rijista — je zuwa Saituna → App → Navigation → Swipe Sensitivity kuma zaɓi Ƙasa (Low), Matsakaici (Medium), ko Babban (High).
onboarding_rememberpos_slide1_body:
Kunna "Remember my place" a Saituna → App → Bayyanar don komawa zuwa babi na ƙarshe ta atomatik lokacin da ka sake buɗe app ɗin.

Hakanan yana ƙara maɓallin 'Continue →' akan shafin take don haka zaka iya ɗauka daidai inda ka tsaya.

Yana buƙatar yanayin dubawa na Intermediate ko sama.
onboarding_leadersnotes_slide1_body: Bayanan Shugabanni suna ba da jagorar kiwo ga shugabannin rukuni da masu ba da shawara - mahimman abubuwan koyarwa da bayanan kula kan abubuwan da ke da hankali don kowane babi.
onboarding_leadersnotes_slide2_body:
Je zuwa Saituna → App → Shafukan Zaɓi → Bayanan Shugabanni kuma kunna shi.

Yana buƙatar yanayin dubawa na Intermediate. Da zarar an kunna, Bayanan Shugabanni suna bayyana a cikin menu na Abubuwan ciki.
onboarding_answercheck_slide1_body:
Ƙaramin gunkin bincike yana bayyana a ƙasan-dama na katunan tambaya masu cancanta. Taɓa shi don gudanar da bincike mai sauri na layi na amsarka - yana duban tsayi, dacewa, da ko amsarka tana hulɗa da nassi.

Ba a buƙatar haɗin intanet. Babu wani abu da ake aikawa ko'ina.
onboarding_answercheck_slide2_body: A yanayin Manual, binciken yana gudana ne kawai lokacin da kake taɓa gunkin da kanka — don haka ka kasance cikin iko na lokacin da kake karɓar ra'ayi. Taɓa gunkin kowane lokaci bayan rubuta amsarka.
onboarding_answercheck_slide3_body: A yanayin Auto (tsoho), binciken yana gudana ta atomatik kowane lokaci da aka adana amsarka — amma kawai idan ka canza amsarka tun binciken ƙarshe, don haka baya taɓa harba sau biyu don rubutu guda ɗaya. Sauya tsakanin Manual da Auto a Saituna → App → Binciken Amsa.
renderchapter_answer_tools_mic_desc: taɓa don faɗin amsarka da murya maimakon rubutawa. Yana bayyana ne kawai idan na'urarka tana goyan bayan shigarwar murya.
renderchapter_answer_tools_localvalidate: yana gudanar da bincike mai sauri na layi na amsarka kuma yana ba da taƙaitaccen ra'ayi. A yanayin Manual kana taɓa wannan gunkin da kanka; a yanayin Auto yana gudana ta atomatik bayan kowane adanawa. Zaka iya canza wannan a Saituna → App.
renderchapter_answer_tools_aichat_desc: malamin AI na zaɓi wanda ke ba da cikakken ra'ayi kan amsarka. A kashe ta tsoho; kunna shi a Saituna → App.
renderchapter_eyebrow_info_title: Wasu abubuwa da za a kula da su
renderchapter_eyebrow_info_body:
Taɓa gunkin ☆ akan katin tambaya don sanya mata tauraro. Tambayoyin da aka sanya wa tauraro ana haskaka su da zinariya kuma ana tattara su a cikin sashin taƙaitawa a saman babi, don haka zaka iya samun tambayoyin da kake son komawa gare su ko tattaunawa da sauri. Hakanan suna bayyana a cikin Babban Ra'ayinka na Ci gaba.

Taɓa gunkin makirufo a cikin kowane filin amsa don faɗin amsarka da murya maimakon rubutawa. Gunkin yana bayyana ne kawai idan na'urarka tana goyan bayan shigarwar murya.

Siririyar layin launi a ƙasan mashin sama ita ce mashin ci gaban babinka — tana cika yayin da kake amsa tambayoyi a wannan babi.

Amsoshinka ana adana su ta atomatik lokacin da ka tashi daga filin amsa — baka buƙatar yin komai. Maɓallin Adana yana wurin idan kana son adanawa da hannu, misali kafin raba amsoshinka.
renderchapter_error_title: Wani abu ya faru ba daidai ba
renderchapter_error_body: Ba a iya nuna wannan babi ba.
renderlib_all_empty_title: Babu nazarin da aka saka tukunna
renderlib_all_empty_body: Je zuwa sashin 'Saka' (Load) sannan ka saka fayil ɗin .estudy don farawa.
renderlib_recent_empty_title: Babu nazarin da aka buɗe kwanan nan
renderlib_recent_empty_body: Nazarce-nazarcen da ka buɗe za su bayyana a nan don samun su cikin sauri.
renderlib_shelves_empty_title: Babu nazarin da za a jera
renderlib_shelves_empty_body: Saka nazarce-nazarce don ganin su a jere bisa nau'ikansu.
renderlib_shelves_no_display: Babu nazarin da za a nuna.
renderlib_shelves_intro: Ana rarraba nazarce-nazarcen da ka saka kai tsaye zuwa shedun littattafai bisa jigo — Tsohon Alkawari da Sabon Alkawari, Akida, Rayuwa, Hidima, da sauransu. Yi amfani da shedun don duba abin da kake da shi kuma ka tafi kai tsaye zuwa nazari.
renderlib_shelves_popup_body:
Lokacin da ka saka nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki, yana bayyana shedun da ya kamata ya kasance — misali "Tsohon Alkawari", "Akida", ko "Rayuwa". Sashin Sheduffi yana amfani da waɗannan alamun ne don tsara duk abin da ka saka a wuri ɗaya mai kyau.

Kuna iya bincika kowane shefu don ganin abin da kuke da shi a wani fanni, ko kuma ku yi amfani da shi don gano abin da kuke rashi a karatunku — kila kuna da nazarce-nazarce da yawa na Sabon Alkawari amma kaɗan ne na Tsohon Alkawari.

Taɓa kowane kanun nazari don buɗe shi kai tsaye. Idan shefu yana nuna sassa (kamar "Shari'a" ko "Linjila da Ayyukan Manzanni"), yi amfani da Faɗaɗa duka don nuna layukan kowane nazari a cikin kowane sashe.

A yadda aka saba, ba a nuna shedun da babu komai a cikinsu. Idan kana son ganin su, za ka iya kunna su a sashin Saituna/Laburare.
renderlib_paths_intro: Hanyoyin nazari rukunin nazarce-nazarcen Littafi Mai Tsarki ne da ke taimaka maka haɗa abin da kake koya, kuma suna ba ka damar lura da ci gabanka.
renderlib_paths_popup_body:
Hanyoyin koyo tarin nazarce-nazarcen Littafi Mai Tsarki ne da aka tsara don ba ka ƙwarewar koyo mai kyau da tsari. Maimakon yin nazarin jigo ɗaya kawai, hanya tana jagorantar ka ta hanyar tafiya mai alaƙa — tana taimaka maka gina abin da ka koya yayin da kake ci gaba.

Kowace hanya tana da nufin haɗawa da nazarce-nazarce daga sassa daban-daban na koyarwar Kirista: Tsohon Alkawari, Sabon Alkawari, muhimman akidun Kirista (tiyoloji), rayuwa (rayuwar Kirista da biyayya), da hidima (yi wa wasu hidima da jagoranci). Wannan yana nufin cewa duk hanyar da ka bi, za ka yi mu'amala da nau'ikan Nassi da jigogi daban-daban.

Don sauƙaƙa farawa, mun haɗa duk nazarce-nazarcen kowace hanya a cikin fayil ɗin zip guda ɗaya. Kawai taɓa alamar saukewa kusa da hanya don saukewa da saka komai lokaci ɗaya.
renderlib_paths_hidden_note: Sashin {count} {count, plural, one{ƙari} other{ƙari}} a cikin wannan hanyar ba su bayyana a nan ba. Don ganin su duka, je zuwa Saituna → Laburare sannan ka ƙara lambar 'Hanyoyi'.
renderlib_study_not_available: Wannan nazarin ba ya samuwa tukunna, amma muna aiki a kansa don nan gaba.
renderlib_pathway_not_available: Wannan hanyar ba ta samuwa tukunna, amma muna aiki a kanta don nan gaba.
renderlib_pathway_set_active: Sanya a matsayin hanyar da ake bi
renderlib_pathway_active_clear: Hanyar da ake bi – taɓa don cirewa
renderlib_download_coming_soon: Mahaɗin saukewa yana nan tafe kwanan nan
renderlib_try_this_heading:
Ba ka san inda za ka fara ba?
Fara a nan!
renderpages_howto_title: Yadda ake amfani da App ɗin
renderpages_newhere_hasstudy_body: Idan kuna son taƙaitaccen bayani game da karatun kafin ku fara, danna maballin da ke ƙasa. Zai sake nuna muku hotunan gabatarwa na karatun {studyTitle}.
renderpages_newhere_nostudy_body: Ba a loda kowane karatu tukuna. Jeka Laburare don loda karatu — manhajar za ta yi maka jagora ta hanyar gabatarwa sa’ad da ka fara buɗe ta.
renderpages_newhere_appslides_prompt: Idan kuna son sake ganin hotunan gabatarwa na manhajar, danna wannan maballin:
renderpages_topbar_library_desc: Danna alamar da ke can hagu don buɗe Laburarenka — jerin fayilolin karatun da ka loda. Daga can za ka iya canza karatu ko loda sabo.
renderpages_topbar_search_desc: Danna alamar bincike don bincika duk tambayoyi da amshoshinku da kuka adana a cikin karatun na yanzu.
renderpages_topbar_progress_desc: Danna alamar ci gaba don buɗe Bayanin Ci gaba — taƙaitaccen adadin tambayoyin da kuka amsa a kowane babi, tare da zoben kammalawa na duk karatun.
renderpages_topbar_howto_desc: Danna alamar Yadda ake Amfani don buɗe wannan shafin. Yana bayyana yadda zaku sami mafi kyawun fa'ida daga karatun kuma yana bayyana fasalolin manhajar.
renderpages_topbar_settings_desc: Danna alamar saituna don buɗe Saituna. Maɓallan zaɓi: Girman Rubutu, Yanayin Duhu, saurin taba shafi, tsayin akwatin amsa, da tsarin rabawa.
renderpages_topbar_contents_desc: Danna maballin abubuwan da ke ciki don buɗe cikakken jerin babobi. Danna kowane babi don tsallake zuwa gare shi kai tsaye. Babobi masu amsoshin da aka adana an yi musu alama da ✓.
renderpages_topbar_progressbar_desc: Siririyar layin mai launi a can kasan saman bar tana nuna adadin tambayoyin da aka amsa a babin yanzu. Kuna iya kunna shi ko kashe shi a Saituna. (Ba ya bayyana a shafukan da ba na babi ba kamar wannan shafin.)
renderpages_topbar_gotosettings_body: Kuna iya daidaita kamanni da halayyar manhajar — girman rubutu, yanayin duhu, saurin taba shafi, da ƙari — daga shafin Saituna.
renderpages_chapters_biblepopup_label: Bayanin ayar Littafi Mai Tsarki a sama
renderpages_chapters_biblepopup_desc: Inda kuka ga ƙaramar alamar bayani kusa da nuni, danna ta don karanta nassin a wani akwati da zai fito. Duk nassosi sun fito ne daga NET Bible. (Sauran bayanan da za su fito za su ba ku wasu bayanan kuma.)
renderpages_chapters_starring_desc: Danna alamar tauraro akan kowane katin tambaya don saka masa tauraro. Tambayoyin da aka yi wa tauraro suna samun hasken zinare kuma suna fitowa a cikin rukunin taƙaitaccen bayani a saman babin da kuma a cikin Bayanin Ci gaba.
renderpages_chapters_notes_desc: Wani yanki na rubutun kyauta a kasan kowane babi don duk abin da bai dace da tambayoyin da aka tsara ba. An haɗa shi a Raba da Turawa. Shawara: latsa kowane fagen amsa na tsawon lokaci don kwafi abubuwan da ke ciki.
renderpages_chapters_save_desc: Danna Adana don adana amsoshinku. Har ila yau, manhajar tana adana kanta lokacin da kuka fita daga fagen amsa.
renderpages_chapters_print_desc: Danna alamar bugawa don bugawa ko adana babi azaman PDF tare da amsoshinku a ciki. Yi amfani da Saituna don buga duk babobi lokaci guda.
renderpages_chapters_share_desc: Danna Raba a kasan kowane babi don aika amsoshinku ta WhatsApp, imel, ko kowace manhaja a wayarku — yana da amfani don rabawa tare da shugaban rukuni ko jagora. Dubi don ƙarin bayani.
renderpages_chapters_voice_desc: Danna alamar makirufo a cikin kowane fagen amsa don faɗi amsar ku ta murya — yana da amfani akan wayar salula inda buga rubutu zai iya zama a hankali. Maballin yana bayyana lokacin da na'urarka ke goyan bayan shigar da magana.
renderpages_chapters_answercheck_desc: Danna alamar duba akan katunan tambayoyin da suka dace don duba amsar ku ba tare da intanet ba — yana duba tsayi, dacewa, da ko amsar ku tana magana da nassin. Babu buƙatar intanet. A yanayin Auto wannan yana gudana kai tsaye bayan kowane adanawa; a yanayin Manual (wanda aka saba dashi) kuna danna shi da kanku. Canza wannan a .
renderpages_chapters_readaloud_desc: Alamar lasifikar akan dogayen nassosi tana ba manhajar damar karanta su da ƙarfi. Kuna iya daidaita waɗanne nassosi ne zai bayyana a kansu a <button class="howto-inline-link" onclick="Router.navigate({ page: 'settings' })">Saituna</button> (ta amfani da yanayin Advanced na Saituna).
renderpages_chapters_navbtns_desc: Maballan Baya da Na gaba a kasan kowane babi. Haka kuma za ku iya tura shafin hagu/dama don matsawa tsakanin babobi.
renderpages_chapters_other_desc: Wasu karatun sun haɗa da ƙarin fasaloli — kamar gajerun tambayoyin bincike ko Zurfafawa bayanan da ke fitowa sama tare da ƙarin karatu ko bayanan baya. Waɗannan za su bayyana sa'ad da kuka ci karo da su.
renderpages_library_loading_body: Taba alamar laburare a kusurwar hagu na sama don bude Laburarenku. Idan kun sami fayil din .estudy, taba Dauko Nazari (Load Study) a kasan allo don shigar da shi. Nazarinsa zai bayyana a jerin sunayenku kuma kuna iya budewa a kowane lokaci.
renderpages_library_switching_body: Duk nazarin da kuka dauko zai bayyana a cikin Laburare. Taba kowane guda don budewa. Ana adana amsoshinku na kowane nazari daban-daban.
renderpages_library_removing_body: Don cire nazari daga Laburare, taba alamar 🗑️ a kan katin sa. Wannan zai goge nazarin da dukan amsoshinku da kuka adana. Tabbatar kun aika ko kun buga amsoshinku tukunna idan kuna son adana su.
renderpages_sharing_chapter_body: A kasan kowane babi, taba Aika (Share) don tura amsoshinku na wannan babin ta WhatsApp, imel, ko kowace manhaja a wayarku. Hanya ce mai kyau don nuna aikinku ga shugaban rukuni ko mai ba da shawara kafin taro.
renderpages_sharing_all_body: Don tura amsoshinku na kowane babi gaba daya, ku tafi Saituna → Nazari → Bayanai → Aika dukan amsoshi. Wannan zai hada komai a takarda guda.
renderpages_sharing_print_title: Buga ko adana a matsayin PDF
renderpages_sharing_print_body: Taba alamar 🖸 a kowane babi don bugawa ko adana PDF na wannan babin tare da amsoshinku. Don fitar da dukan babobi a matsayin PDF guda, ku tafi Saituna → Nazari → Bayanai → Buga / fitar da dukan babobi.
renderpages_sharing_format_body: A cikin Saituna kuna iya zaba tsakanin WhatsApp Formatted (rubutu mai kauri da WhatsApp ke ganewa) da Plain Text (wanda ya fi dacewa da imel). Kuna iya sauya wannan a kowane lokaci.
renderpages_shareapp_know_title: Shin kun san wanda zai amfana?
renderpages_shareapp_know_body: Idan kuna tunanin wani zai sami fa'idar wannan nazari — aboki, dan uwa, ko wani a cikin cocinku — kuna iya aika masa da mahadar manhajar ta amfani da maballin da ke kasa.
renderpages_shareapp_download_intro: Haka kuma kuna iya dauko manhajar kai tsaye ku sanya ta a wayar Android. Fayil din zip ne mai dauke da lambar sirri — ga yadda za a yi amfani da shi:
renderpages_shareapp_download_step1: Taba maballin da ke kasa don dauko fayil din zip daga Google Drive.
renderpages_shareapp_download_step2: Bude shi (unzip) ta amfani da lambar sirri: 1234
renderpages_shareapp_download_note: (Dalilin sanya lambar sirri shi ne don Google Drive yana tantance fayilolin .apk; lambar sirri + zip suna taimaka wa wuce wannan tantancewar.)
renderpages_leaders_confidential: An tanadar wa shugabannin rukuni da masu ba da shawara
renderpages_copyright_licence_link: Don ganin kwafin wannan lasisin, ziyarci creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0.
renderpages_copyright_share_entry: Aika (Share): kwafo da raba kayan a kowane hali ko tsari.
renderpages_copyright_adapt_entry: Gyara (Adapt): hadawa, sauyawa, da gina wani abu a kan kayan don kowace manufa, har ma don kasuwanci.
renderpages_copyright_attribution_entry: Yabo (Attribution): Dole ne ku ba da yabon da ya dace, samar da mahadar lasisin, kuma ku nuna idan an yi canje-canje.
renderpages_copyright_sharealike_entry: ShareAlike: Idan kuka sake hadawa, ko sauyawa, ko gina wani abu a kan kayan, dole ne ku raba gudunmawarku a karkashin lasisi guda da na asali.
renderpages_settings_textsize_preview: Adali zai rayu ta wurin bangaskiya. Abin da aka haifa daga Ruhu, ruhu ne.
renderpages_settings_textsize_makebig: Sa girman rubutu ya yi girma
renderpages_settings_darkmode_desc: Ya fi sauƙi ga idanu a cikin duhu
renderpages_settings_progressbar_desc: Sandar zinariya da ke nuna kammala babi
renderpages_settings_rememberplace_desc: Idan an sake farawa, koma babin ƙarshe da kake karantawa. Haka kuma a nuna maɓallin 'Ci gaba' a shafin taken.
renderpages_settings_readingfont_desc: Zaɓi font ɗin da za a yi amfani da shi don rubutun jiki a duk faɗin binciken
renderpages_settings_iconstyle_desc: Zaɓi salon gunkin da ake amfani da shi a cikin app ɗin. Zai fara aiki lokacin da ka sake kewayawa.
renderpages_settings_answercheck_desc:
Manual — gunkin duba amsa yana bayyana akan katunan tambayoyin da suka dace; danna shi da kanka lokacin da kake son ra'ayi.

Auto — ra'ayi yana gudana kai tsaye bayan an ajiye kowace amsa (lokacin da ka fita daga filin), amma sai idan amsar ta canza tun bayan dubawar ƙarshe.
renderpages_settings_navbtns_desc: Nuna maɓallan kewayawa na babi a ƙasan kowane babi
renderpages_settings_swipe_desc: Yaya nisa kake buƙatar gogewa don canza babi
renderpages_settings_answerbox_desc: Yaya tsayin filin amsar yake kafin ka fara rubutu
renderpages_settings_myprogress_desc: Shafin taƙaitaccen bayani da ke nuna adadin tambayoyin da ka amsa a kowane babi, tare da zoben kammalawa.
renderpages_settings_notes_desc: Shafin rubutu kyauta bayan Babi na 9, misali don tunanin da bai dace da kowane babi ba. Ana adana bayanai idan an kashe shafin; yana sake bayyana lokacin da aka sake kunna shi.
renderpages_settings_leaders_desc: Jagorar makiyaya ga shugabannin rukuni da masu ba da shawara, tare da abubuwan koyarwa da bayanan kula kan abubuwan kula ga kowane babi.
renderpages_settings_howto_label: Yadda ake amfani da wannan App
renderpages_settings_howto_desc: Gabatarwa ga app ɗin — yadda ake samun mafi kyau daga binciken, yadda tambayoyin ke aiki, da jagora ga fasalulluka na app ɗin.
renderpages_settings_about_desc: Bayanin binciken — manufofinsa, tsarinsa, da marubucin.
renderpages_settings_autosave_desc: Nuna taƙaitaccen tabbaci lokacin da aka adana amsoshi ta atomatik
renderpages_settings_shareformat_desc: Tsarin WhatsApp yana ƙara alamun rubutu masu kauri don WhatsApp. Plain Text ya fi dacewa da imel.
renderpages_settings_readaloud_desc: Danna gunkin lasifika akan wani nassi ko popup don a karanta shi da murya. Zaɓi lokacin da gunkin zai bayyana.
renderpages_settings_answerbtn_desc: Nuna maɓallin duba malamin AI akan katunan tambaya
renderpages_settings_appupdates_body:
Wannan app ɗin ba a riga an same shi a Google Play ba (amma yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba). A halin yanzu:

  • Google Drive: Ana iya zazzage sabuntawa kai tsaye daga Google Drive.
  • An matse (Zipped): Domin Google Drive yana da hankali game da fayilolin APK, fayil ɗin yana cikin fayil ɗin zip mai kariya da kalmar sirri.
  • Kalmar sirri: Kalmar sirrin ita ce 1234.

Don sabuntawa:

  1. Danna maɓallin da ke ƙasa don zazzage zip ɗin.
  2. Cire shi ta amfani da kalmar sirri: 1234
  3. Buɗe APK don shigarwa.

(Dalilin kalmar sirri shine Google Drive yana nuna fayilolin .apk; kalmar sirri + zip tana ketare wannan.)
renderpages_settings_interfacemode_choos: Zaɓi adadin abubuwan da ake iya gani. Kuna iya canza wannan a kowane lokaci.
renderpages_settings_mode_basic_desc: kwarewar karatu mai tsafta tare da mahimman saitunan nuni kawai.
renderpages_settings_mode_intermediate_d: yana ƙara font ɗin karatu, girman akwatin amsa, shafukan zaɓi, Laburare, da sabuntawar app.
renderpages_settings_mode_advanced_desc: dukkan saitunan da ake da su.
renderpages_settings_wantmore_body: App ɗin yana da Yanayin Interface wanda ke sarrafa adadin zaɓuɓɓukan da aka nuna muku. Da zarar kun saba da yadda app ɗin ke aiki, gwada canzawa daga Basic zuwa Intermediate, ko ma Advanced. Mai canza yanayin Interface yana ƙasan wannan shafin.
renderpages_settings_shareall_desc: Tattara dukkan amsoshinka da ka ajiye a dukkan surori tara zuwa takarda guda daya don rabawa a WhatsApp, email, ko kowace manhaja.
renderpages_settings_printall_label: Buga ko fitarwa a matsayin PDF
renderpages_settings_printall_desc: Tattara amsoshinka (kamar na sama) amma an tsara su don bugawa ko adanawa a matsayin fayil na PDF.
renderpages_settings_resetsettings_label: Sake saita saituna zuwa na asali
renderpages_settings_resetsettings_desc: Yana mayar da dukkan zabubbukanka (girman rubutu, yanayin duhu, da sauran saituna) zuwa yadda suke a asali. Za a sake nuna bayanin farko na manhajar. Wannan ba zai taba amsoshinka, bayanan kula, ci gaba, ko inda ka tsaya karatu ba.
renderpages_settings_clearwarning_text: Share amsoshinka na din-din-din ne kuma ba za a iya dawo da su ba. Dukkan rubutattun amsoshi a dukkan surori tara za a goge su daga wannan na'urar. Babu yadda za a iya dawo da su.
renderpages_settings_clearwarning_sugges: Kuna iya amfani da maballan Raba ko Buga na sama don adana kwafin amsoshinku kafin ku share su.
renderpages_settings_clearanswers_btn: Share dukkan amsoshi da aka ajiye
renderpages_settings_recent_desc:
Nuna karatun da ka bude kwanan nan.
  • A kashe — ba a taba nunawa.
  • >5 — yana bayyana da zaran kana da karatu sama da 5.
  • A kunne — ana nunawa kullum.
renderpages_settings_shelves_desc:
Nuna karatuttuka da aka tsara ta rukuni.
  • A kashe — ba a taba nunawa.
  • >8 — yana bayyana da zaran kana da karatu sama da 8.
  • A kunne — ana nunawa kullum.
renderpages_settings_emptyshelves_label: Ko a nuna shattoci marasa komai
renderpages_settings_emptyshelves_desc:
Sarrafa ko za a nuna rukunoni marasa komai a sashen Shattoci.
  • Babu — ana boye sassa da shattoci marasa komai gaba daya.
  • Kadan — sassa marasa komai a cikin shattoci masu karatu za a nuna su a sanyaye.
  • Da yawa — ana nuna dukkan shattoci da sassa marasa komai.
  • Duka — ana nuna dukkan shattoci, sassa, da kananan sassa marasa komai.
renderpages_settings_paths_desc:
Nuna hanyoyin koyo da aka tsara ta rukuni.
  • A kashe — ba a taba nunawa.
  • >2 — yana bayyana da zaran kana da karatu sama da 2.
  • A kunne — ana nunawa kullum.
renderpages_settings_pathsamount_label: Sashen “Hanyoyi” — yawan abin da za a nuna
renderpages_settings_pathsamount_desc:
Hanyoyi nawa ne (jerin karatun da aka tsara) za a nuna.
  • Daya — nuna hanya ta farko kawai.
  • Kadan — manyan kanun labarai da kuma karamin kanun labarai na farko a kowannensu.
  • Da yawa — manyan kanun labarai da kananan kanun labarai guda biyu na farko.
  • Duka — nuna dukkan matakai.
renderpages_settings_language_desc: Zaɓi harshen da za a yi amfani da shi a fuskar manhajar. Wannan ba zai shafi abubuwan nazari da amshoshinku ba.
progress_encourage_0: An shirya tsaf don farawa – mu fara mana.
progress_encourage_24: Ka fara da kyau. Ci gaba da haka!
progress_encourage_39: Kana samun ci gaba na gaske. Barka da kokari.
progress_encourage_49: Ka kusa isa rabi – cikin sauri nawa za ka iya isa wurin?
progress_encourage_74: Ka wuce rabi yanzu. Ci gaba da kokari.
progress_encourage_99: Ka kusa gamawa. Za ka iya yi!
progress_no_study_active: Babu karatun da yake a kunne yanzu
progress_count_no_answers_start: Babu amsoshin da aka ajiye tukunna – fara da Sura ta 1
progress_count_all_done: An amsa dukkan tambayoyi – barka da kokari!
progress_count_no_answers: Babu amsoshin da aka ajiye tukunna
progress_count_pathway_all_done: An amsa dukkan tambayoyin hanya – barka da kokari!
progress_pathway_no_studies_opened: Ba a buɗe bincike ko ɗaya ba tukunna
progress_btn_current_study_title: Wannan shi ne binciken da ake yi yanzu
progress_detail_open_to_start: Buɗe wannan binciken don fara bin diddigin ci gabanka.
progress_detail_not_installed: Ba a riga an girka wannan binciken ba.
progress_detail_no_answers: Ba a riga an rubuta amsoshi ba.
progress_notes_placeholder: Rubuta kowane abu a nan — babu tambayoyin da za a amsa kuma babu amsar da take daidai ko kuskure…
progress_notes_autosave_label: Ana adanawa yayin da kake rubutu
progress_notes_info_body:
Wannan fili ne na zaɓi don kowane bayani ko tunani wanda bai dace sosai da takamaiman babi ba — lura da abubuwan da suka shafi surori da yawa, tambayoyin da kake son komawa gare su, abubuwan da ka ji a tattaunawar rukuni, ko duk wani abu da kake son tunawa.

Yi amfani da shi duk yadda ka ga zai taimaka, ko kuma ka yi watsi da shi gaba ɗaya idan ka fi so. Ba zai shafi ci gabanka a binciken ba. Kuna iya sake kashe wannan shafin a kowane lokaci a cikin Saituna.

Idan ka kashe shi, duk abin da ka rubuta a nan ana kiyaye shi lafiya kuma zai sake bayyana idan ka sake kunna shi.
search_empty_prompt:
Fara rubutu don neman tambayoyi,
nassosi, da amsoshinka da aka adana.
settings_clear_answers_body: Wannan zai goge dukkan amsoshinku da aka adana na wannan binciken har abada. Ba za a iya dawo da su ba.
settings_reset_body:
Wannan zai mayar da duk saitin ku (girman rubutu, yanayin dare, da sauran zaɓe) zuwa yadda suke na asali. Bayanan gabatarwa kuma za su sake fitowa a buɗewar gaba.

Amsoshinku, bayanai, ci gaba, da wurin da kuka tsaya karantawa yanzu ba za su canza ba.
shareprint_no_answers_body: Ba ku riga kun adana wata amsa ba. Yi aiki ta wasu babobi tukunna, sannan ku dawo don fitarwa.
shareprint_print_fallback_chapter:
{studyTitle} — Babi na {number}: {chapterTitle}

(Ba za a iya bugawa ba — yi amfani da raba (Share) maimakon haka)
shareprint_print_fallback_all: Bugu ba zai yiwu ba a wannan na'urar. Yi amfani da raba dukan amsoshi maimakon haka.
studyloader_delete_body: Wannan zai share karatun da duk amsoshinka da aka ajiye har abada. Shin ka raba ko ka buga aikinka?
studyloader_version_older: Wannan fayil ɗin karatun ya tsufa fiye da yadda ake tsammani. Fayil: v{actual} · App yana tsammanin: v{expected}. Da fatan za a sabunta fayil ɗin karatun.
studyloader_version_newer: Wannan fayil ɗin karatun ya fi na yanzu sabuntawa. Fayil: v{actual} · App yana tsammanin: v{expected}. Da fatan za a sabunta app ɗin zuwa sabon sigar.
studyloader_picker_eyebrow: App ɗin Karatun Littafi Mai Tsarki
studyloader_picker_body: Zaɓi fayil ɗin bayanan karatu (.estudy) don loda babobinsa, tambayoyi, da abun ciki.
studyloader_error_load_json: An kasa loda fayil ɗin karatu: {error}
studyloader_error_no_study_json: {filename} zip ne amma ba shi da fayil ɗin da ke ƙarewa da study.json.
utils_celebration_sub: An kammala babi na {number}. Ci gaba da kokari!
validation_tutor_err_network: Ba a iya samun malamin AI ba — duba haɗin yanar gizo ka sake gwadawa.
validation_tutor_err_429: Malamin AI yana da aiki da yawa — da fatan za a dakata na ɗan lokaci sannan ka sake gwadawa.
validation_tutor_err_auth: Malamin AI: Matsalar API key. Duba saitunan karatu.
validation_tutor_err_404: Malamin AI: ba a sami samfurin (model) ba. Tuntuɓi mawallafin karatun.
validation_tutor_err_500: Malamin AI: kuskuren sabar (server error) — sake gwadawa nan da ɗan lokaci.
validation_tutor_err_status: Malamin AI: kuskure {status} — da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
validation_tutor_err_unknown: Malamin AI: wani abu ya tafi ba daidai ba — da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
validation_lv_stuck_hint: Ga alama kamar ka tsaya. Ga taimako:
validation_lv_stuck_no_hint: Ga alama kamar ka tsaya. Gwada farawa da abin da nassin ya sa kake tunani, ji, ko mamaki — ko da ba ka da cikakkiyar amsa.
validation_lv_too_short: Wannan farawa ne — amma ko za ka iya ƙara bayani kaɗan? Ko da jimla ɗaya ko biyu ne zasu taimaka maka ka zurfafa tunani a kan tambayar.
validation_lv_repeats_question: Ga alama amsarka tana maimaita tambayar ne. Gwada sanya ra'ayin a cikin kalmominka na kanka.
validation_lv_repeats_passage: Ga alama amsarka tana maimaita nassin ne. Gwada ba da amsar tambayar daga nassin, a cikin kalmominka na kanka.
validation_lv_off_topic_hint: Amsarka na iya tafiya wata hanyar daban da abin da tambayar ke nema (ko kuma wataƙila kana da hanyar sadarwa ta musamman).
validation_lv_off_topic_no_hint: Amsarka na iya tafiya wata hanyar daban da abin da tambayar ke nema (ko kuma wataƙila kana da hanyar sadarwa ta musamman). Sake karanta tambayar a hankali: Wane takamaiman ra'ayi take nuna maka?
validation_lv_pass_thematic: Yayi kyau. Amsarka ta dace da tambayar — ci gaba.
validation_lv_pass_no_sample_no_hint: Amsarka ta wuce matakin farko na dubawa. Wannan tambayar ba ta da bayanan jigo (thematic data), don haka ba a yi bincike na gaba ba.
voice_error_mic_denied: An hana izinin amfani da makirufo
voice_error_no_api: Yi amfani da 🎤 a kan madannin kwamfutarka (keyboard)
